name: PokeAPI - Pokemon Evolution Chain
description: Fetch Pokemon evolution chains including types, abilities, and stats

config.sql:
SELECT 
  pokemon_id,
  name,
  fetch_evolution,
  'https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon/' || pokemon_id as pokemon_url,
  'https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon/' || pokemon_id || '/?fields=id,name,types,abilities,stats' as basic_info_url,
  'https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon-species/' || pokemon_id as species_url,
  'GET' as method
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY pokemon_id

SELECT 
  pokemon_id,
  name,
  fetch_evolution,
  'https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon/' || pokemon_id as pokemon_url,
  'https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/pokemon-species/' || pokemon_id as species_url,
  'https://pokeapi.co/api/v2/evolution-chain/' || pokemon_id as evolution_chain_url,
  'GET' as method
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY pokemon_id

SELECT 
  pokemon_id,
  name,
  evolution_chain_url,
  'https://pokeapi.co/docs/v2.html' as api_documentation
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY pokemon_id
